Bosch House Act 1 Sprite Candidates

Status: rejected-canon-mismatch. Native ChatGPT import lane. Current native sheet is rejected for visual Swagbound canon mismatch; alpha cleanup is blocked; runtime promotion is blocked.

Approval: no imported art is approved, and Phaser runtime promotion is not allowed from this packet.

Incoming PNG drop folder: asset-lab/sprites/bosch-house-act1/_incoming/native-chatgpt

Contact sheet: contact-sheets/bosch-house-act1-contact-sheet.png

Manifest: manifests/bosch-house-act1-candidates.json

Rejected Native Sheet Evidence

Primary blocker: These sprites do not follow Swagbound canon visually.

Art approval: rejected. Alpha QA: not worth remediating / blocked by canon rejection.

The raw sheet is preserved only as rejected evidence. Do not alpha-clean, crop-promote, or import these outputs into Phaser runtime.

Crop manifest: _incoming/native-chatgpt/crop-manifest.json

Rejection Reasons

  • These sprites do not follow Swagbound canon visually.
  • Generic chibi/JRPG style, not Swagbound canon.
  • Literal Wi-Fi iconography replaces proof/receipt/signal language.
  • Bosch reads as generic protagonist, not Signal Town/Bosch default.
  • Guardian reads as generic mother/maid, not practical guardian/community logistics role.
  • Cousin reads as generic hoodie kid, not rumor/signal/sticker lens.
  • Signal-pet reads as robot mascot, not domestic signal-sensitive pet.
  • Receipt Router reads as generic Wi-Fi printer, not patched household save/checkpoint/status object.
  • The sheet does not mine or express Swagbound lore.
